response.overview: Jehoon, a financially struggling director who has been waiting for an opportunity for long years, serendipitously secures a commission from the major conglomerate RF Corporation to shoot a promotional film using AI actors. Unfortunately, on the set, AI malfunctions repeatedly, causing disruptions in the shoot and plunging Jehoon into despair. At this critical moment, Minnam, a celebrity with an appearance identical to the AI actor, visits the set, sparking a hopeful idea in Jehoon's mind. From that point on, the shooting scene gradually takes an unexpected turn...  Amidst the chaos of the secretive and scheming shooting location, can Jehoon successfully complete the shoot?
response.title: Real Fantasy
